"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\spdlog.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\spdlog.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\spdlog.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -shared -o libspdlog.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libspdlog.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,1,--minor-image-version,17 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\spdlog.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\spdlog.dir\linkLibs.rsp
